'''鈭歯g-dh-p''' ('''ngadhapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whim|whim]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whim|whim]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-dh-p
|-
! Lemma
| ngadhapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngadhapithi|ngadhapithi]] || [[word:ngadhapiji|ngadhapiji]] || [[word:ngadhapishi|ngadhapishi]] || [[word:ngadhapi|ngadhapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhaputhuth|ngadhaputhuth]] || [[word:ngadhapujuj|ngadhapujuj]] || [[word:ngadhapushush|ngadhapushush]] || [[word:ngadhap|ngadhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhaputhu|ngadhaputhu]] || [[word:ngadhapuju|ngadhapuju]] || [[word:ngadhapushu|ngadhapushu]] || [[word:ngadhapu|ngadhapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhapufuth|ngadhapufuth]] || [[word:ngadhapufuj|ngadhapufuj]] || [[word:ngadhapufush|ngadhapufush]] || [[word:ngadhapuf|ngadhapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngadhapethe|ngadhapethe]] || [[word:ngadhapeje|ngadhapeje]] || [[word:ngadhapeshe|ngadhapeshe]] || [[word:ngadhape|ngadhape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhapothoth|ngadhapothoth]] || [[word:ngadhapojoj|ngadhapojoj]] || [[word:ngadhaposhosh|ngadhaposhosh]] || [[word:ngadhap|ngadhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhapotho|ngadhapotho]] || [[word:ngadhapojo|ngadhapojo]] || [[word:ngadhaposho|ngadhaposho]] || [[word:ngadhapo|ngadhapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhapofoth|ngadhapofoth]] || [[word:ngadhapofoj|ngadhapofoj]] || [[word:ngadhapofosh|ngadhapofosh]] || [[word:ngadhapof|ngadhapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngadhap忙th忙|ngadhap忙th忙]] || [[word:ngadhap忙j忙|ngadhap忙j忙]] || [[word:ngadhap忙sh忙|ngadhap忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngadhap忙|ngadhap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadhapathath|ngadhapathath]] || [[word:ngadhapajaj|ngadhapajaj]] || [[word:ngadhapashash|ngadhapashash]] || [[word:ngadhap|ngadhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadhapatha|ngadhapatha]] || [[word:ngadhapaja|ngadhapaja]] || [[word:ngadhapasha|ngadhapasha]] || [[word:ngadhapa|ngadhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadhapafath|ngadhapafath]] || [[word:ngadhapafaj|ngadhapafaj]] || [[word:ngadhapafash|ngadhapafash]] || [[word:ngadhapaf|ngadhapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngadhapasha|ngadhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongadhapasha|gongadhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingadhapasha|gokingadhapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngadhapn眉sha|ngadhapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongadhapnkn眉sha|gongadhapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingadhapn眉sha|gokingadhapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngadhapsh毛sha|ngadhapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongadhapnksh毛sha|gongadhapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingadhapsh毛sha|gokingadhapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngadhaprosha|ngadhaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongadhapnkrosha|gongadhapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingadhaprosha|gokingadhaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngadhapmusha|ngadhapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongadhapnkmusha|gongadhapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingadhapmusha|gokingadhapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngadhapsherasha|ngadhapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongadhapnksherasha|gongadhapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingadhapsherasha|gokingadhapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngadhapngasha|ngadhapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongadhapnkngasha|gongadhapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingadhapngasha|gokingadhapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngadhapyasha|ngadhapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongadhapnkyasha|gongadhapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingadhapyasha|gokingadhapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngadhapyamasha|ngadhapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongadhapnkyamasha|gongadhapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingadhapyamasha|gokingadhapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngadhapn眉sh毛sha|ngadhapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongadhapnkn眉sh毛sha|gongadhapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingadhapn眉sh毛sha|gokingadhapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngadhapn眉rosha|ngadhapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongadhapnkn眉rosha|gongadhapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingadhapn眉rosha|gokingadhapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngadhapn眉musha|ngadhapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongadhapnkn眉musha|gongadhapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingadhapn眉musha|gokingadhapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngadhapsh毛n眉sha|ngadhapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongadhapnksh毛n眉sha|gongadhapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingadhapsh毛n眉sha|gokingadhapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngadhapsh毛rosha|ngadhapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongadhapnksh毛rosha|gongadhapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingadhapsh毛rosha|gokingadhapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngadhapsh毛musha|ngadhapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongadhapnksh毛musha|gongadhapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingadhapsh毛musha|gokingadhapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngadhapron眉sha|ngadhapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongadhapnkron眉sha|gongadhapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingadhapron眉sha|gokingadhapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngadhaprosh毛sha|ngadhaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongadhapnkrosh毛sha|gongadhapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingadhaprosh毛sha|gokingadhaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngadhapromusha|ngadhapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongadhapnkromusha|gongadhapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingadhapromusha|gokingadhapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngadhapmun眉sha|ngadhapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongadhapnkmun眉sha|gongadhapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingadhapmun眉sha|gokingadhapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngadhapmush毛sha|ngadhapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongadhapnkmush毛sha|gongadhapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingadhapmush毛sha|gokingadhapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngadhapmurosha|ngadhapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongadhapnkmurosha|gongadhapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingadhapmurosha|gokingadhapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngadhap|ngadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙dh忙p|ng忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongadhap|hongadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙dh忙p|hong忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongadhap|hohongadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙dh忙p|hohong忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngadhap|n眉ngadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙dh忙p|n眉ng忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngadhap|n眉n眉ngadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙dh忙p|n眉n眉ng忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngadhap|n茂ngadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙dh忙p|n茂ng忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngadhap|n茂n茂ngadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙dh忙p|n茂n茂ng忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungadhap|lungadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙dh忙p|lung忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungadhap|lulungadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙dh忙p|lulung忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingadhap|lingadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙dh忙p|ling忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingadhap|lilingadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙dh忙p|liling忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongadhap|kongadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙dh忙p|kong忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongadhap|kokongadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙dh忙p|kokong忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengadhap|kengadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙dh忙p|keng忙dh忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengadhap|kekengadhap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙dh忙p|kekeng忙dh忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
